name: Fiesta Chicken, Low Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, combine tomato sauce, orange juice, onion, raisins, pimento, oregano, chili powder, and garlic.
2. Add chicken breast pieces (cut into 1-inch pieces) to the skillet.
3. Pour in hot pepper sauce.
4. Bring mixture to boiling point.
5. Reduce heat and cover; simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Stir in cornstarch mixed with water.
7. Return to boiling and stir until thickened and bubbly, cooking an additional 2 minutes.
8. Toss parsley into the cooked rice.
9. Serve chicken mixture over the rice.
Per serving: 248 calories, 21 g protein, 35 g carbohydrates, 2 g fat, 49 mg cholesterol, 277 mg sodium, 430 mg potassium.
